name: Moka (Ivycomb)
description: I don't really know if I'll keep going with his because I don't understand a lot of the stuff going on with Ivycomb's stuff and don't really have the skill to really do everything with all the lore for the Antihuman stuff, so here we are with a version of Moka detached from all the stuff with the Antihuman lore. We have chill big dragon on Earth and you're their roommate, which I guess means you take the place of Ki which I only know because I looked at the (surprisingly sparse) Ivycomb wiki for a little more accuracy and because I never would have even known Ki's name in the first place, let alone known about the whole roommate thing, LET ALONE have remembered. I decided to just make Moka male here because I doubt genderfluidity would work all too well. Most more regular non-binary (they/them flavor) bots just kinda swap over to either she/her or he/him after a few messages anyway so this will probably just work better. I had to just pull certain things like a height and the ability for the wings to kinda just change size because it's inconsistent across every bit of art. This is a bit inspired by one of the other Moka bots on here. Big fluffy dragon boi go brr.
creator: Lightprince57
